nodes.name: jsonb_jsonpath.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for JSONPath operators applied to jsonb values, covering path expressions, filters, and method calls.

nodes.name: jsonpath.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the jsonpath data type and expressions, covering syntax, casting, and predicate evaluation.

nodes.name: jsonpath_encoding.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for JSONPath encoding behavior, verifying Unicode handling and encoding-specific path expression parsing.

nodes.name: limit.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for LIMIT and OFFSET clauses, covering edge cases including zero limits, large offsets, and combined with ORDER BY.

nodes.name: line.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the line geometric data type, covering construction, intersection, containment, and distance operations.

nodes.name: lock.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for table locking (LOCK TABLE), covering lock modes, compatibility matrix, and lock escalation behavior.

nodes.name: lseg.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the lseg (line segment) geometric data type, verifying construction, operators, and distance calculations.

nodes.name: macaddr.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the macaddr data type, covering parsing, comparison, bitwise operations, and MAC address formatting.

nodes.name: macaddr8.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the macaddr8 (EUI-64) data type, verifying 8-byte MAC address operations and EUI-48 to EUI-64 conversion.

nodes.name: matview.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for materialized views, covering CREATE, REFRESH, CONCURRENTLY, and interactions with indexes and permissions.

nodes.name: misc_functions.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for miscellaneous built-in functions including system information, text, and aggregate helper functions.

nodes.name: misc_sanity.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression sanity checks for catalog consistency, verifying that no invalid objects or orphaned dependencies exist.

nodes.name: money.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the money data type, covering parsing, arithmetic, casting, and locale-sensitive formatting.

nodes.name: multirangetypes.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for multirange types, covering construction, containment, union, intersection, and custom multirange types.

nodes.name: mvcc.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for MVCC (Multi-Version Concurrency Control) behavior, verifying snapshot isolation and visibility rules.

nodes.name: name.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the name data type (internal identifier type), covering operations, length limits, and comparison behavior.

nodes.name: namespace.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for schema namespaces, verifying search_path behavior, schema creation, object ownership, and cross-schema access.

nodes.name: numeric.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for the numeric (arbitrary precision) type, covering precision, scale, overflow, rounding, and all arithmetic.

nodes.name: numeric_big.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for numeric operations with very large and very precise values, verifying big-number arithmetic correctness.

nodes.name: numerology.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for numeric literal parsing and type coercion, covering numeric constants and implicit type conversions.
